admin_welcome: 👋 Hello, {name}! 🤖 Getolog — a platform to monetize your Telegram channel. Send your bot token and we'll create an automated seller bot. Choose from the menu:
back_to_menu:
👋 {name}, you're back to the menu.

Choose from the menu:
no_bots: 🤖 My bots You don't have any bots yet. Press "➕ Add bot".
select_bot: 🤖 My bots Select a bot to manage:
help_text: ❓ Help 🤖 Getolog — a platform for automatic management of private Telegram channels. More info: https://getolog.uz/info Public offer: https://getolog.uz/offerta How it works: 1. ➕ Add a bot by sending your token 2. The bot is automatically created and connected to the channel 3. Users pay through the bot 4. You confirm payment — user gets access to the channel Main sections: 📊 Statistics — revenue and users 💳 Payments — confirm pending payments 👥 Users — manage subscribers ⚙️ Settings — bot settings 📦 Subscription — Standard and Premium plans available Contact team: @getologbot
send_token_prompt: Review the public offer: getolog.uz/offerta 🔑 Send your bot token 1. Go to @BotFather 2. Send the /newbot command 3. Enter the bot name 4. Send the received token here Token format: 123456:ABC-DEF... ⚠️ By sending the token, you agree to the public offer!
token_format_error: ❌ Invalid format. Token should look like: 123456:ABC-DEF1234ghIkl-zyx57W2v1u123ew11 Try again:
token_invalid:
❌ Invalid token or the bot is disabled.
Get a new token from @BotFather and try again.
bot_found_ask_card: ✅ Bot found: @{username} 💳 Send your card number for receiving payments: (Example: 8600 1234 5678 9012) Or if access is free, press the button below:
card_invalid:
❌ Invalid card number. Enter a valid 16-digit card number.
Try again:
add_bot_to_channel: 📢 Now add @{username} as admin to your channel. 1. Go to channel settings 2. Open the Administrators section 3. Add @{username} as an administrator ✅ After adding, forward any message from the channel here. Or use the buttons below:
free_mode_selected: 🆓 Free mode selected! 📢 Now add @{username} as admin to your channel. 1. Go to channel settings 2. Open the Administrators section 3. Add @{username} as an administrator ✅ After adding, forward any message from the channel here. Or use the buttons below:
channel_not_added: ❌ Bot hasn't been added to the channel yet. Add @{username} as admin to the channel, then check again.
channel_found_ask_price: ✅ {type} found: {title} 💰 Enter the access price (in UZS): (Example: 50000)
manual_channel_prompt: 📢 Send the ID of your channel or group. To get ID: add @getmyid_bot to the channel. (Example: -1001234567890)
channel_not_found:
❌ Channel/group not found. Make sure the bot is added as admin.
Try again:
price_invalid: ❌ Price must be at least 1000 UZS. Try again:
bot_created_free: ✅ Bot successfully created! 🤖 @{username} is now running. 🆓 Access is free — users can join the channel by pressing /start. Use the menu to change settings.
bot_created_paid: ✅ Bot successfully created! 🤖 @{username} is now running. Users can pay for access by pressing /start. Use the menu to change settings.
plan_free: 📦 Current plan: Free 🤖 Bots: {bots}/{limit} 👥 Multi-admin: ❌ 🔹 Getolog may send ads 🔹 Getolog branding is shown 🔹 Payment: card + screenshot only To upgrade, select a plan:
plan_standard: 📦 Current plan: Standard 📅 Expiration date: {expires} ✅ Status: Active 🤖 Bots: {bots}/{limit} 👥 Multi-admin: ✅ (up to {collab_limit}) 🔹 No ads 🔹 Branding is shown 🔹 Payment: card + screenshot only To upgrade to Premium:
plan_premium: 📦 Current plan: Premium 📅 Expiration date: {expires} ✅ Status: Active 🤖 Bots: {bots}/{limit} 👥 Multi-admin: ✅ (up to {collab_limit}) 🔹 No ads 🔹 No branding 🔹 Click / Payme integration active
plan_old: 📦 Current plan: {plan} (legacy) 📅 Expiration date: {expires} ✅ Status: Active After expiration, you can choose one of the new plans.
buy_plan: 💳 {name} subscription — {price} UZS/mo {features} Transfer payment to the card: {card} ✅ After payment, send a screenshot of the receipt.
sub_payment_received:
✅ Payment details received!

⏳ Waiting for moderator confirmation. Subscription will be activated after confirmation.
sub_rejected: ❌ Payment rejected. Payment could not be confirmed. Please transfer the correct amount and try again.
payment_not_found_or_processed: ❌ Payment not found or already processed.
payment_approved_admin:
✅ Payment #{id} confirmed!
👤 Invite link sent to @{username}.
payment_notify_failed:
⚠️ Could not notify the user. Invite link:
{link}
ask_welcome_message: ✏️ Send a new welcome message. This message is shown when a user presses /start in the bot.
card_invalid_16: ❌ Invalid card number. Enter a valid 16-digit card number:
price_min_error: ❌ Price must be at least 1000 UZS:
collabs_no_access: 👥 Collaborators ❌ Adding collaborators is not available on the Free plan. Upgrade to Standard or Premium.
add_collab_prompt: 👤 Send the collaborator's Telegram ID. To get ID, the collaborator should press /start at @getmyid_bot.
collab_already_exists: ❌ This user is already added as a collaborator.
collab_self_error: ❌ You cannot add yourself as a collaborator.
deactivate_confirm: ⚠️ Confirm deletion of @{username}. If you delete this bot: • Bot will stop responding to users • All settings will be preserved Continue?
user_banned_msg: ⛔ You have been blocked by the admin. You cannot use this bot.
user_unbanned_msg: ✅ You have been unblocked by the admin. You can use the bot again.
no_bot_yet: ⚠️ You don't have any bots yet. Create a bot first.
which_bot: 🤖 Which bot would you like to manage?
welcome: Hello! Press the button below to access the paid channel.
payment_card_info: 💳 Card payment Transfer money to the following card: {card} ✅ After transfer, send a screenshot of the receipt. Press /cancel to cancel.
payment_send_screenshot: ✅ After transfer, send a screenshot of the receipt.
payment_received:
✅ Payment details received!

⏳ Waiting for admin confirmation. An invite link will be sent after confirmation.
payment_approved: ✅ Your payment is approved! Invite link:
payment_rejected: ❌ Your payment was rejected. Please try again.
payment_settings_missing:
❌ The bot owner hasn't set up payment settings yet.
Please try again later.
send_photo_only: ❌ Please send a photo (screenshot). Text messages are not accepted. Press /cancel to cancel.
subscription_active: ✅ You already have an active subscription!
subscription_expires_3day: ⚠️ Your subscription expires in 3 days. Renew now!
subscription_expires_1day: 🔴 Your subscription expires tomorrow! Renew now.
subscription_expired: ⏰ Your subscription has expired. Press /start to subscribe again.
support_header: 📩 Support Write your message, the admin will respond soon.
support_prompt: 📩 Write your message, the admin will respond soon.
support_sent: ✅ Your message has been sent to the admin!
mod_login_success: ✅ Success! 🛡 Moderator Panel Choose from the menu:
mod_password_wrong:
❌ Wrong password. Try again:

Press /cancel to cancel.
mod_password_short: ❌ Password must be at least 4 characters. Try again:
mod_logged_out: 👋 You have logged out of the moderator panel.
forward_not_channel: ❌ This message is not from a channel or group. Please forward a message from the channel.
